summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DOMMMA V4 Buy/Sell functionality. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Rent/Buy toggle on Browse page, enhanced filters (property type, parking, price range, bedrooms), sale listing modal with 'For Sale' badge and 'Make an Offer' button, Homepage 'Properties For Sale' section with 4 sale listings, Dashboard sidebar showing 'My Offers' (renters) and 'Offers' (landlords).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/listings?listing_type=rent returns 23 rental listings
Backend: GET /api/listings?listing_type=sale returns 5 sale listings
Backend: GET /api/listings?bedrooms=3 returns filtered results
Backend: GET /api/listings?parking=true returns filtered results
Backend: GET /api/listings?property_type=House returns filtered results
Backend: Combined filters work (listing_type + bedrooms + pet_friendly)
Backend: POST /api/offers creates offer with correct fields (buyer_id, offer_amount, financing_type, status=pending)
Backend: POST /api/offers with invalid listing returns 404
Backend: GET /api/offers/buyer/{id} returns buyer's offers with listing data attached
Backend: GET /api/offers/seller/{id} returns offers received by seller
Backend: PUT /api/offers/{id}/respond?action=accepted updates offer status
Backend: PUT /api/offers/{id}/respond with counter offer works
Backend: PUT /api/offers/{id}/respond with invalid action returns 400
Backend: GET /api/ returns DOMMMA V3 API message
Backend: GET /api/listings returns listings (regression)
Backend: GET /api/contractors/search returns contractors (regression)
Backend: GET /api/listings/{id} returns listing details
Backend: Sale listings have listing_type=sale and realistic prices (>$100k)
Backend: Sale listings data structure verified
Frontend: Browse page shows Rent/Buy toggle in header
Frontend: Rent toggle shows 23 rental properties (default)
Frontend: Buy toggle shows 5 sale listings with proper prices
Frontend: Filters panel opens with property type, bedrooms, min/max price, parking, pets checkboxes
Frontend: Sale listing modal shows 'HOUSE · FOR SALE' badge
Frontend: Sale listing modal shows year built, lot size, garage info
Frontend: Sale listing modal has 'Make an Offer' button
Frontend: Sale listing modal shows full price (e.g., $2,450,000) not monthly
Frontend: Homepage shows 'Properties For Sale' section
Frontend: Homepage sale section shows 4 properties with 'For Sale' badges
Frontend: Renter dashboard sidebar shows 'My Offers' link
Frontend: Landlord dashboard sidebar shows 'Offers' link
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Using existing: 23 rental listings, 5 sale listings (Character Home in Kitsilano $2,450,000, Modern Cambie Corridor Townhouse $1,350,000, Yaletown Investment Studio $550,000, East Van Heritage Duplex $1,750,000, North Van Mountain View Penthouse $2,100,000), 7+ contractors, 18+ services.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V4 Buy/Sell features fully tested and working: 1) Browse page has Rent/Buy toggle in header - clicking Buy shows 5 sale listings with full prices. 2) Enhanced filters include property_type dropdown, parking checkbox, min/max price inputs, bedrooms dropdown. 3) Sale listing modals show 'For Sale' badge, year built, lot size, garage, and 'Make an Offer' button. 4) Homepage has 'Properties For Sale' section with 4 cards. 5) Offers API endpoints: POST /api/offers, GET /api/offers/buyer/{id}, GET /api/offers/seller/{id}, PUT /api/offers/{id}/respond. 6) Dashboard sidebars: renters see 'My Offers', landlords see 'Offers'. All V3 AI features (Smart Issue Reporter, Document Analyzer, Commute Optimizer) still working.

Browse Page Rent/Buy Toggle.details: Header shows Rent (default) and Buy buttons. Rent shows 23 properties, Buy shows 5 sale listings.

Enhanced Browse Filters.details: Filter panel includes: All Types dropdown, Bedrooms dropdown, Min ($) input, Max ($) input, Pets OK checkbox, Parking checkbox.

Sale Listing Modal.details: Shows 'HOUSE · FOR SALE' badge, $2,450,000 price (not monthly), Year Built: 1948, Lot: 5,500 sqft, Garage: 1, 'Make an Offer' button, Message button.

Homepage Properties For Sale.details: Section shows 'BUY PROPERTY' label, 'Properties For Sale' heading, 4 sale listing cards with prices and 'For Sale' badges.

Offers API.details: POST /api/offers creates offers. GET /api/offers/buyer/{id} returns buyer's offers with listing data. PUT /api/offers/{id}/respond handles accept/reject/counter.

Dashboard Sidebar Links.details: Renters see 'My Offers' in sidebar. Landlords see 'Offers' in sidebar.

Listings Filter API.details: listing_type=rent returns 23, listing_type=sale returns 5. bedrooms, parking, property_type filters work correctly.

notes.Sale_Listings: 5 sale listings seeded with prices: $550k-$2.45M. All have listing_type='sale', year_built, and other sale-specific fields.
notes.Offer_Flow: Buyer clicks 'Make an Offer' on sale listing -> redirects to /offers with listing pre-filled -> submits offer -> seller sees in 'Received' tab -> can accept/reject/counter.
notes.Previous_Features: All V3 features (AI tools, email, contractors) and V2 features (contractor marketplace, applications, maintenance) still working per previous testing.
